summary: Core command-settings foundation is present and all requested test commands pass, but backend tests do not explicitly cover the new /api/dashboard/protected/bot-settings/commands contract and one unrelated dist asset is currently deleted in the working tree.

apiFocused.command: cd api && npm.cmd test -- test/controlPlane.server.test.js test/durum.command.test.js

knownProblems: No API test currently references /api/dashboard/protected/bot-settings/commands or bot_command_settings_upsert.
No focused API assertion currently verifies the .durum disabled-path response when enabled=false.
dashboard/dist/assets/index-Clx5aPzq.css is deleted in the working tree (likely unrelated artifact drift).
riskyAreas: api/src/controlPlane/botSettingsRoutes.js was heavily rewritten; old status-command compatibility appears preserved via existing passing tests, but new commands-route behavior is not directly API test-covered.
dashboard/src/pages/Dashboard.jsx command-settings section was modified mid-recovery and should be re-reviewed for UX/text consistency.
Mixed Turkish/mojibake text patterns in Dashboard.jsx can cause visible label inconsistency.
recommendedNextAction: Add dedicated API integration tests for GET/PUT /api/dashboard/protected/bot-settings/commands (defaults, enabled=false, detailMode=compact, invalid payloads), add/extend durum command tests for enabled=false, restore or intentionally regenerate deleted dist asset, then rerun full API and dashboard tests.
